command.vscode-igorpro.registerDictionar: Register Editor Content as User-Defined Dictionary
configuration.vscode-igorpro.igorVersion: Specifies the target version of Igor Pro. This affects code suggestion.
The value must start with a number with two decimal places, such as `7.38` and `9.01`.
configuration.vscode-igorpro.showSymbols: Shows a markdown preview in addition to the source text when [Show User-defined Symbols](command:vscode-igorpro.showUserDefinedSymbolsJson) command is invoked.
configuration.vscode-igorpro.dictionaryP: Controls the format of the editor tab shown by the [Show Dictionary Preview](command:vscode-igorpro.showDictionaryPreview) command.
configuration.vscode-igorpro.suggest.sup: Suppresses the amount of messages for code suggestion.
Hides the detail of unresolved completion items, where function parameters are shown in case the item is a function.
Hides the description of unresolved completion item labels, where file paths are typically shown.
Truncates explanatory text of a resolved completion item to a sentence.
Truncates explanatory text in a hover, which is shown when the mouse cursor is on a symbol, to a paragraph.
Truncates explanatory text in a signature help, which is shown when the user edits function arguments, to a paragraph.
configuration.vscode-igorpro.suggest.sco: Limits the scope of global symbols considered in code hinting.
Global symbols in workspaces are suggested without being filtered.
Global symbols defined in open documents and files included by them are suggested.
Global symbols defined in current document and files included by it are suggested.
configuration.vscode-igorpro.suggest.sym: Specifies the absolute path to a JSON file in which symbols are defined. The following predefined variables are supported for the path: `${userHome}`, `${workspaceFolder}`. See a JSON file created by [Show User Defined Symbols (JSON)](command:vscode-igorpro.showUserDefinedSymbolsJson) command for the file format.
capabilities.untrustedWorkspaces.descrip: By security reasons, Several configuration properties are disabled in untrusted workspaces.
